build.beforeDevCommand: R="$PWD"; while [ "$R" != / ] && [ ! -e "$R/bundle/fetch-deps.sh" ]; do R="$(dirname "$R")"; done; npm --prefix "$R/editor" install && bash "$R/bundle/fetch-deps.sh" && npm --prefix "$R/editor" run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: R="$PWD"; while [ "$R" != / ] && [ ! -e "$R/bundle/fetch-deps.sh" ]; do R="$(dirname "$R")"; done; bash "$R/bundle/fetch-deps.sh" && npm --prefix "$R/editor" install && npm --prefix "$R/editor" run build
